1.name: Rage
1.description: As a bonus action, enter a rage for 1 minute. Gain advantage on Strength checks and saves, +2 melee damage with Strength weapons (bonus at higher levels), and resistance to bludgeoning/piercing/slashing damage.

1.name: Unarmored Defense
1.description: AC equals 10 + Dexterity modifier + Constitution modifier while not wearing armor.

2.name: Reckless Attack
2.description: On the first attack on your turn, you can attack recklessly. Gain advantage on melee attacks using Strength, but attacks against you have advantage until your next turn.

2.name: Danger Sense
2.description: Advantage on Dexterity saves against effects you can see, such as traps and spells. Cannot be used while blinded, deafened, or incapacitated.

3.name: Primal Path
3.description: Choose a Primal Path: Path of the Berserker, Path of the Totem Warrior, or another archetype. Grants path-specific features at this and later levels.

4.name: Ability Score Improvement
4.description: Increase one ability score by 2, or two ability scores by 1 each. Alternatively, take a feat.

5.name: Extra Attack
5.description: You can attack twice when you take the Attack action.

5.name: Fast Movement
5.description: Your speed increases by 10 feet while not wearing heavy armor.

7.name: Feral Instinct
7.description: Advantage on Initiative rolls. While raging, you cannot be surprised.

8.name: Ability Score Improvement
8.description: Increase one ability score by 2, or two ability scores by 1 each. Alternatively, take a feat.

9.name: Brutal Critical
9.description: Score a critical hit on a roll of 19 or 20 with melee weapons. Roll one additional damage die on a critical hit.

11.name: Relentless Rage
11.description: If you drop to 0 HP while raging and don't die outright, make a DC 10 Constitution save. On success, drop to 1 HP instead. DC increases by 5 each time (max DC 30).

12.name: Ability Score Improvement
12.description: Increase one ability score by 2, or two ability scores by 1 each. Alternatively, take a feat.

15.name: Persistent Rage
15.description: Your rage is so fierce that it ends early only if you fall unconscious, choose to end it, or are incapacitated.

16.name: Ability Score Improvement
16.description: Increase one ability score by 2, or two ability scores by 1 each. Alternatively, take a feat.

17.name: Brutal Critical (2 dice)
17.description: Roll two additional damage dice on a critical hit with melee weapons.

18.name: Indomitable Might
18.description: If your total for a Strength check is less than your Strength score, use the score in place of the total.

19.name: Ability Score Improvement
19.description: Increase one ability score by 2, or two ability scores by 1 each. Alternatively, take a feat.

20.name: Primal Champion
20.description: Strength and Constitution scores increase by 4. Can exceed 20, up to 24.

20.name: Brutal Critical (3 dice)
20.description: Roll three additional damage dice on a critical hit with melee weapons.

3.name: Frenzy
3.description: While raging, you can make a single melee weapon attack as a bonus action. You suffer one level of exhaustion after the rage ends.

6.name: Mindless Rage
6.description: While raging, you cannot be charmed or frightened, and you have advantage on saves against being frightened or charmed.

10.name: Intimidating Presence
10.description: Use your action to frighten someone with your Intimidation check. They must make a Wisdom save or be frightened of you for 1 minute.

14.name: Retaliation
14.description: When a creature damages you while you are raging, use your reaction to make a melee weapon attack against it.

3.name: Totem Spirit
3.description: Choose a totem animal (Bear, Wolf, Eagle, etc.). Gain a feature while raging based on the chosen animal.

6.name: Aspect of the Beast
6.description: Gain additional benefits based on your totem animal even while not raging.

10.name: Spirit Walker
10.description: Cast commune with nature as a ritual. Gain the ability to see the spirit world while doing so.

14.name: Totemic Attunement
14.description: Gain a powerful spiritual benefit based on your totem animal while raging.

3.name: Divine Fury
3.description: While raging, the first creature you hit on your turn takes extra necrotic damage equal to 2 + half your barbarian level.

3.name: Warrior of the Gods
3.description: If you die, any spell that revives you only takes 1 action and any material cost is halved.

6.name: Zealous Focus
6.description: While raging, you have advantage on one attack roll or saving throw. Recharge when you rage.

10.name: Fanatical Focus
10.description: If you fail a saving throw while raging, you can reroll it and must use the new roll. Recharges on rage.

14.name: Zealot's Blessing
14.description: When you use action surge, regain HP equal to your barbarian level + Constitution modifier.

1.name: Spellcasting
1.description: You know 4 cantrips and 2 1st-level spells from the bard spell list. Learn additional spells as you level. Use Charisma as your spellcasting ability.

1.name: Bardic Inspiration
1.description: As a bonus action, give a Bardic Inspiration die (d6) to one creature within 60 feet. They can add it to one ability check, attack roll, or saving throw within 10 minutes.

2.name: Jack of All Trades
2.description: Add half your proficiency bonus (rounded down) to any ability check that doesn't already include your proficiency bonus.

2.name: Song of Rest
2.description: During a short rest, you or friendly creatures who hear your performance regain extra HP equal to 1d6 + your bard level.

3.name: Bard College
3.description: Choose a Bard College: College of Lore, College of Valor, or another archetype. Grants college-specific features.

3.name: Expertise
3.description: Choose two of your skill proficiencies. Your proficiency bonus is doubled for any ability check using those skills.

4.name: Ability Score Improvement
4.description: Increase one ability score by 2, or two ability scores by 1 each. Alternatively, take a feat.

5.name: Bardic Inspiration (d8)
5.description: Your Bardic Inspiration die becomes a d8.

5.name: Font of Inspiration
5.description: Regain all expended Bardic Inspiration uses on a short or long rest.

6.name: Countercharm
6.description: As an action, start a performance that lasts until the end of your next turn. You and friendly creatures within 30 feet have advantage on saves against being frightened or charmed.

6.name: Bard College Feature
6.description: Gain your Bard College's 6th-level feature.

8.name: Ability Score Improvement
8.description: Increase one ability score by 2, or two ability scores by 1 each. Alternatively, take a feat.

9.name: Song of Rest (d8)
9.description: Song of Rest healing increases to 1d8 + bard level.

10.name: Bardic Inspiration (d10)
10.description: Your Bardic Inspiration die becomes a d10.

10.name: Expertise
10.description: Choose two more skill proficiencies to gain expertise in.

10.name: Magical Secrets
10.description: Learn two spells from any class spell list. These count as bard spells for you.

12.name: Ability Score Improvement
12.description: Increase one ability score by 2, or two ability scores by 1 each. Alternatively, take a feat.

13.name: Song of Rest (d10)
13.description: Song of Rest healing increases to 1d10 + bard level.

14.name: Magical Secrets
14.description: Learn two more spells from any class spell list.

14.name: Bard College Feature
14.description: Gain your Bard College's 14th-level feature.

15.name: Bardic Inspiration (d12)
15.description: Your Bardic Inspiration die becomes a d12.

16.name: Ability Score Improvement
16.description: Increase one ability score by 2, or two ability scores by 1 each. Alternatively, take a feat.

18.name: Song of Rest (d12)
18.description: Song of Rest healing increases to 1d12 + bard level.

19.name: Ability Score Improvement
19.description: Increase one ability score by 2, or two ability scores by 1 each. Alternatively, take a feat.

19.name: Magical Secrets
19.description: Learn two more spells from any class spell list.

20.name: Superior Inspiration
20.description: When you roll initiative and have no Bardic Inspiration uses remaining, regain one use.

3.name: Bonus Proficiencies
3.description: Gain proficiency with three skills of your choice.

3.name: Cutting Words
3.description: When a creature you can see makes an attack roll, ability check, or damage roll, use your reaction to expend Bardic Inspiration to reduce the roll.

6.name: Additional Magical Secrets
6.description: Learn two spells from any class spell list.

14.name: Peerless Skill
14.description: When you make an ability check, you can expend Bardic Inspiration to add the die to the roll. You can do this after seeing the roll.

3.name: Bonus Proficiencies
3.description: Gain proficiency with medium armor, shields, and martial weapons.

3.name: Combat Inspiration
3.description: A creature that receives Bardic Inspiration can add the die to its damage roll or its AC against a melee attack.

6.name: Extra Attack
6.description: You can attack twice when you take the Attack action.

14.name: Battle Magic
14.description: When you cast a bard spell with a casting time of 1 action, you can make one weapon attack as a bonus action.

3.name: Bonus Proficiencies
3.description: Gain proficiency with medium armor, scimitar, and the Performance ability to use as a spellcasting focus.

3.name: Fighting Style
3.description: Choose a fighting style from: Dueling or Two-Weapon Fighting.

6.name: Blade Flourish
6.description: Learn flourishes that let you spend Bardic Inspiration: Slashing Flourish (extra damage + move), Defensive Flourish (AC bonus), Mobile Flourish (push + follow).

14.name: Master's Flourish
14.description: When you use Blade Flourish, you can use the optional effect without expending Bardic Inspiration.

1.name: Spellcasting
1.description: You know 3 cantrips and prepare spells from the cleric spell list using Wisdom.

1.name: Divine Domain
1.description: Choose a Divine Domain: Life, Light, Tempest, Trickery, War, Knowledge, Nature, or another domain. Grants domain spells and features.

2.name: Channel Divinity (1/rest)
2.description: You gain the ability to channel divine energy from your deity. Gain two Channel Divinity options: Turn Undead and your domain's feature.

2.name: Turn Undead
2.description: Each undead within 30 feet must make a Wisdom save. On failure, it is turned for 1 minute (flees from you).

3.name: 2nd-Level Spells
3.description: You can now prepare 2nd-level spells.

4.name: Ability Score Improvement
4.description: Increase one ability score by 2, or two ability scores by 1 each. Alternatively, take a feat.

5.name: Destroy Undead
5.description: Turned undead with CR 1/2 or lower are destroyed instead of turned.

5.name: 3rd-Level Spells
5.description: You can now prepare 3rd-level spells.

6.name: Channel Divinity (2/rest)
6.description: You can use Channel Divinity twice between rests.

6.name: Divine Domain Feature
6.description: Gain your domain's 6th-level feature.

7.name: 4th-Level Spells
7.description: You can now prepare 4th-level spells.

8.name: Ability Score Improvement
8.description: Increase one ability score by 2, or two ability scores by 1 each. Alternatively, take a feat.

8.name: Destroy Undead (CR 1)
8.description: Turned undead with CR 1 or lower are destroyed.

8.name: Divine Domain Feature
8.description: Gain your domain's 8th-level feature.

9.name: 5th-Level Spells
9.description: You can now prepare 5th-level spells.

10.name: Divine Intervention
10.description: Call on your deity for aid. Roll percentile dice. If you roll equal to or below your cleric level, your deity intervenes. Usable once per 7 days.

11.name: Destroy Undead (CR 2)
11.description: Turned undead with CR 2 or lower are destroyed.

12.name: Ability Score Improvement
12.description: Increase one ability score by 2, or two ability scores by 1 each. Alternatively, take a feat.

14.name: Destroy Undead (CR 3)
14.description: Turned undead with CR 3 or lower are destroyed.

15.name: 6th-Level Spells
15.description: You can now prepare 6th-level spells.

16.name: Ability Score Improvement
16.description: Increase one ability score by 2, or two ability scores by 1 each. Alternatively, take a feat.

17.name: Destroy Undead (CR 4)
17.description: Turned undead with CR 4 or lower are destroyed.

17.name: 7th-Level Spells
17.description: You can now prepare 7th-level spells.

18.name: Channel Divinity (3/rest)
18.description: You can use Channel Divinity three times between rests.

19.name: Ability Score Improvement
19.description: Increase one ability score by 2, or two ability scores by 1 each. Alternatively, take a feat.

20.name: Divine Intervention Improvement
20.description: Divine Intervention automatically works if your cleric level is 20 or higher (no roll needed).

1.name: Disciple of Life
1.description: When you cast a spell of 1st level or higher that restores HP, the target regains additional HP equal to 2 + the spell's level.

1.name: Life Domain Spells
1.description: You always have bless, cure wounds, lesser restoration, spirit guardians, beacon of hope, revivify, mass cure wounds, raise dead prepared.

2.name: Preserve Life
2.description: Use Channel Divinity to restore HP to creatures within 30 feet. Each creature regains HP equal to 5 + twice your cleric level, divided as you choose. No effect on undead or constructs.

6.name: Blessed Healer
6.description: When you heal a creature with a spell of 1st level or higher, you regain HP equal to 2 + the spell's level.

8.name: Divine Strike
8.description: Once per turn, weapon attacks deal extra 1d8 radiant damage.

17.name: Supreme Healing
17.description: When you roll dice to restore HP with a spell, use the maximum number possible for each die.

1.name: Light Cantrip
1.description: You learn the light cantrip.

1.name: Warding Flare
1.description: When a creature attacks you, you can use your reaction to impose disadvantage. UsableWisMod/day.

2.name: Radiance of the Dawn
2.description: Channel Divinity: 30-foot sphere of light. Each enemy makes a Con save or takes 2d10 + cleric level radiant damage; success halves it.

6.name: Improved Flare
6.description: Warding Flare also blinds the attacker until the end of your next turn.

8.name: Divine Strike
8.description: Weapon attacks deal extra 1d8 radiant damage once per turn.

17.name: Corona of Light
17.description: Constant aura of bright light in 60 feet. Enemies that start their turn in the light take 10 radiant damage.

1.name: Wrath of the Storm
1.description: When hit by a melee attack, use reaction to deal 2d8 lightning/thunder damage to the attacker. WisMod/day.

2.name: Destructive Wrath
2.description: Channel Divinity to maximize lightning/thunder damage from your spells.

6.name: Thunderous Strike
6.description: When you deal lightning/thunder damage, you can push the target 10 feet.

8.name: Divine Strike
8.description: Weapon attacks deal extra 1d8 thunder damage once per turn.

17.name: Stormborn
17.description: You have resistance to lightning and thunder damage. You gain a flying speed of 60 feet that you can use only to fly in difficult conditions.

1.name: War Priest
1.description: Gain proficiency with martial weapons and heavy armor.

1.name: War God's Blessing
1.description: Once on each of your turns when you hit with a weapon attack, you can add your proficiency bonus to the damage. WisMod/long rest.

2.name: Guided Strike
2.description: Channel Divinity: When a creature within 30 feet makes an attack roll, you can add 10 to the roll.

6.name: War Domain Feature
6.description: Once per turn when you hit with a weapon, you deal +1d8 weapon damage.

8.name: Divine Strike
8.description: Weapon attacks deal extra 1d8 weapon damage once per turn.

17.name: Avatar of Battle
17.description: While wearing heavy armor, you have resistance to bludgeoning, piercing, and slashing damage from nonmagical weapons.

1.name: Druidic
1.description: You know Druidic, a secret language known only to druids.

1.name: Spellcasting
1.description: You know 2 cantrips and prepare spells from the druid spell list using Wisdom.

2.name: Wild Shape
2.description: Use an action to transform into a beast with CR 1/4 or lower. Can use twice per short rest. Each form lasts up to 1 hour ( Concentration). Can only transform into beasts you've seen.

3.name: Druid Circle
3.description: Choose a Druid Circle: Circle of the Moon, Circle of the Land, or another archetype.

4.name: Ability Score Improvement
4.description: Increase one ability score by 2, or two ability scores by 1 each. Alternatively, take a feat.

4.name: Wild Shape Improvement
4.description: Can transform into beasts with CR 1/2 or lower.

5.name: 3rd-Level Spells
5.description: You can now prepare 3rd-level spells.

6.name: Druid Circle Feature
6.description: Gain your circle's 6th-level feature.

7.name: 4th-Level Spells
7.description: You can now prepare 4th-level spells.

8.name: Ability Score Improvement
8.description: Increase one ability score by 2, or two ability scores by 1 each. Alternatively, take a feat.

8.name: Wild Shape Improvement
8.description: Can transform into beasts with CR 1 or lower.

9.name: 5th-Level Spells
9.description: You can now prepare 5th-level spells.

10.name: Cantrip Form
10.description: You can cast cantrips while in Wild Shape.

10.name: Druid Circle Feature
10.description: Gain your circle's 10th-level feature.

12.name: Ability Score Improvement
12.description: Increase one ability score by 2, or two ability scores by 1 each. Alternatively, take a feat.

14.name: Druid Circle Feature
14.description: Gain your circle's 14th-level feature.

15.name: 6th-Level Spells
15.description: You can now prepare 6th-level spells.

16.name: Ability Score Improvement
16.description: Increase one ability score by 2, or two ability scores by 1 each. Alternatively, take a feat.

18.name: Timeless Body
18.description: You age at a very slow rate. For every 10 years that pass, your body ages only 1 year.

18.name: Beast Spells
18.description: You can cast spells in Wild Shape, using gestures and vocalizations. The spells must have a casting time of 1 action.

19.name: Ability Score Improvement
19.description: Increase one ability score by 2, or two ability scores by 1 each. Alternatively, take a feat.

20.name: Archdruid
20.description: You can use Wild Shape an unlimited number of times. Ignore time and elemental restrictions on shapes.

2.name: Combat Wild Shape
2.description: While in Wild Shape, you can use a bonus action on your turn to take the Dash action.

2.name: Circle Forms
2.description: You can use Wild Shape to transform into beasts with CR 1 (half your druid level, rounded down).

6.name: Primal Strike
6.description: Your attacks in beast form count as magical for overcoming resistance and immunity to nonmagical attacks.

10.name: Elemental Wild Shape
10.description: You can expend two Wild Shape uses to transform into an elemental (air, earth, fire, or water) for up to 1 hour.

14.name: Thousand Forms
14.description: You can cast alter self at will.

2.name: Bonus Cantrip
2.description: Learn one additional druid cantrip.

2.name: Natural Recovery
2.description: During a short rest, recover expended spell slots with a combined level equal to half your druid level (rounded up).

3.name: Circle Spells
3.description: Choose a biome (Forest, Desert, Mountain, etc.). Gain additional spells that are always prepared.

6.name: Land's Stride
6.description: Moving through nonmagical difficult terrain costs no extra movement. You gain advantage on saves against plants that are magically created or manipulated.

10.name: Nature's Ward
10.description: You cannot be charmed or frightened by elementals or fey, and you are immune to poison and disease.

14.name: Nature's Sanctuary
14.description: Creatures have disadvantage on attacks against you when you are in natural terrain (forests, mountains, etc.).

2.name: Halo of Spores
2.description: A 10-foot aura of toxic spores surrounds you. At the start of your turn, each creature in the aura takes 1d4 necrotic damage.

2.name: Symbiotic Entity
2.description: While in Wild Shape, the necrotic damage of Halo of Spores increases to 1d6, and you gain temporary HP equal to your druid level.

6.name: Fungal Infestation
6.description: When a creature dies within 10 feet of you, it rises as a zombie under your control at the end of your next turn.

10.name: Spreading Spores
10.description: Halo of Spores expands to 30 feet.

14.name: Fungal Body
14.description: You gain resistance to bludgeoning, piercing, and slashing damage.

1.name: Fighting Style
1.description: Choose a fighting style.

1.name: Second Wind
1.description: As a bonus action, regain HP equal to 1d10 + your fighter level. Usable once per short rest.

2.name: Action Surge
2.description: On your turn, take one additional action. Usable once per short rest.

3.name: Martial Archetype
3.description: Choose a Martial Archetype: Champion, Battle Master, Eldritch Knight, or another archetype.

4.name: Ability Score Improvement
4.description: Increase one ability score by 2, or two ability scores by 1 each. Alternatively, take a feat.

5.name: Extra Attack
5.description: You can attack twice when you take the Attack action.

6.name: Ability Score Improvement
6.description: Increase one ability score by 2, or two ability scores by 1 each. Alternatively, take a feat.

7.name: Martial Archetype Feature
7.description: Gain your archetype's 7th-level feature.

8.name: Ability Score Improvement
8.description: Increase one ability score by 2, or two ability scores by 1 each. Alternatively, take a feat.

9.name: Indomitable
9.description: You can reroll a saving throw. Must use the new roll. Usable once per long rest.

10.name: Martial Archetype Feature
10.description: Gain your archetype's 10th-level feature.

11.name: Extra Attack (2)
11.description: You can attack three times when you take the Attack action.

12.name: Ability Score Improvement
12.description: Increase one ability score by 2, or two ability scores by 1 each. Alternatively, take a feat.

13.name: Indomitable (2/long rest)
13.description: You can use Indomitable twice per long rest.

14.name: Ability Score Improvement
14.description: Increase one ability score by 2, or two ability scores by 1 each. Alternatively, take a feat.

15.name: Martial Archetype Feature
15.description: Gain your archetype's 15th-level feature.

16.name: Ability Score Improvement
16.description: Increase one ability score by 2, or two ability scores by 1 each. Alternatively, take a feat.

17.name: Action Surge (2/short rest)
17.description: You can use Action Surge twice per short rest.

17.name: Indomitable (3/long rest)
17.description: You can use Indomitable three times per long rest.

18.name: Martial Archetype Feature
18.description: Gain your archetype's 18th-level feature.

19.name: Ability Score Improvement
19.description: Increase one ability score by 2, or two ability scores by 1 each. Alternatively, take a feat.

20.name: Extra Attack (3)
20.description: You can attack four times when you take the Attack action.

3.name: Improved Critical
3.description: Critical hit range on attack rolls expands to 19-20.

7.name: Remarkable Athlete
7.description: Add half your proficiency bonus (rounded up) to Strength, Dexterity, and Constitution checks, and initiative.

10.name: Additional Fighting Style
10.description: Choose another fighting style from the fighter list.

15.name: Superior Critical
15.description: Critical hit range expands to 18-20.

18.name: Survivor
18.description: Regain HP equal to 5 + your Constitution modifier at the start of each of your turns if you have at least 1 HP.

3.name: Combat Superiority
3.description: Learn 3 maneuvers from a list. You have 4 superiority dice (d8). Use a bonus action to exert a maneuver to gain its effect.

3.name: Student of War
3.description: Gain proficiency with one type of artisan's tools.

7.name: Know Your Enemy
7.description: Study a creature for 1 minute to learn its class, AC, HP range, and highest ability score.

10.name: Improved Combat Superiority
10.description: Superiority dice increase to d10s. Learn 2 more maneuvers.

15.name: Relentless
15.description: When you roll initiative and have no superiority dice, regain one die.

3.name: Spellcasting
3.description: You know 3 cantrips and prepare wizard spells. Use Intelligence as your spellcasting ability. This makes you a 1/3 caster.

3.name: Weapon Bond
3.description: Bond a weapon to yourself. It cannot be disarmed. You can summon it to your hand as a bonus action.

4.name: War Magic
4.description: When you cast a spell as a bonus action, you can make one weapon attack as part of the same action.

7.name: War Magic
7.description: When you use your action to cast a spell, you can make one weapon attack as a bonus action.

10.name: Eldritch Strike
10.description: Once per turn when you hit with a weapon attack, you can channel magical energy to deal additional force damage.

15.name: Arcane Charge
15.description: When you use Action Surge, you can teleport up to 30 feet to an unoccupied space you can see.

18.name: Improved War Magic
18.description: When you cast a wizard spell as an action, you can make two weapon attacks as a bonus action.

1.name: Unarmored Defense
1.description: AC equals 10 + Dexterity modifier + Wisdom modifier while not wearing armor and using no shield.

1.name: Martial Arts
1.description: Use Dexterity instead of Strength for unarmed strikes. Roll a d4 for damage (increases at higher levels). When you take the Attack action with an unarmed strike, you can make one bonus action unarmed strike.

2.name: Ki
2.description: Gain a pool of Ki points equal to your monk level. Spent points replenish on a short or long rest. Ki options: Flurry of Blows (1 ki), Patient Defense (1 ki, Dodge), Step of the Wind (1 ki, Dash or Disengage).

3.name: Monastic Tradition
3.description: Choose a Monastic Tradition: Way of the Open Hand, Way of Shadow, Way of the Four Elements, or another tradition.

3.name: Deflect Missiles
3.description: When hit by a ranged weapon attack, reduce damage by 1d10 + Dex mod + monk level. If reduced to 0, spend 1 ki to throw it back.

4.name: Ability Score Improvement
4.description: Increase one ability score by 2, or two ability scores by 1 each. Alternatively, take a feat.

4.name: Slow Fall
4.description: Reduce falling damage by 5 × monk level when you are adjacent to a wall.

5.name: Extra Attack
5.description: You can attack twice when you take the Attack action.

5.name: Stunning Strike
5.description: When you hit with a melee weapon attack, spend 1 ki to attempt to stun the target (Con save or stunned until end of your next turn).

6.name: Ki-Empowered Strikes
6.description: Your unarmed strikes count as magical for overcoming resistance and immunity.

6.name: Monastic Tradition Feature
6.description: Gain your tradition's 6th-level feature.

7.name: Evasion
7.description: When subjected to an effect that allows a Dexterity save for half damage, take no damage on success and half on failure.

7.name: Stillness of Mind
7.description: Use an action and 1 ki to end one effect causing you to be charmed or frightened.

8.name: Ability Score Improvement
8.description: Increase one ability score by 2, or two ability scores by 1 each. Alternatively, take a feat.

9.name: Unarmored Movement Improvement
9.description: Movement speed increases by 15 feet while unarmored.

10.name: Purity of Body
10.description: Immunity to poison and disease.

11.name: Monastic Tradition Feature
11.description: Gain your tradition's 11th-level feature.

12.name: Ability Score Improvement
12.description: Increase one ability score by 2, or two ability scores by 1 each. Alternatively, take a feat.

13.name: Tongue of the Sun and Moon
13.description: You can speak, read, and write any language.

14.name: Diamond Soul
14.description: Gain proficiency in all saving throws. Spend 1 ki to reroll a failed save.

15.name: Timeless Body
15.description: For every 10 years that pass, your body ages only 1 year.

16.name: Ability Score Improvement
16.description: Increase one ability score by 2, or two ability scores by 1 each. Alternatively, take a feat.

17.name: Monastic Tradition Feature
17.description: Gain your tradition's 17th-level feature.

18.name: Empty Body
18.description: Spend 4 ki to become invisible for 1 minute. Also gain resistance to all damage for that duration.

19.name: Ability Score Improvement
19.description: Increase one ability score by 2, or two ability scores by 1 each. Alternatively, take a feat.

20.name: Perfect Self
20.description: When you roll for initiative and have no ki points, regain 4 ki points. Your mastery of ki grants you a state of near-transcendence.

3.name: Open Hand Technique
3.description: Flurry of Blows can push 15 feet, knock prone, or prevent reactions on each bonus action unarmed strike.

6.name: Wholeness of Body
6.description: Spend 1 ki to heal yourself for an amount equal to 3 × monk level.

11.name: Tranquility
11.description: Beginning of your turn and as bonus action: spend 1 ki for 10-foot aura. Creatures in aura can't attack you unless they make a Wisdom save.

17.name: Quivering Palm

3.description: You can now prepare and cast 2nd-level spells.

4.name: Ability Score Improvement
4.description: Increase one ability score by 2, or two ability scores by 1 each. Alternatively, take a feat.

5.name: 3rd-Level Spells
5.description: You can now prepare and cast 3rd-level spells.

6.name: Arcane Tradition Feature
6.description: Gain your tradition's 6th-level feature.

7.name: 4th-Level Spells
7.description: You can now prepare and cast 4th-level spells.

8.name: Ability Score Improvement
8.description: Increase one ability score by 2, or two ability scores by 1 each. Alternatively, take a feat.

9.name: 5th-Level Spells
9.description: You can now prepare and cast 5th-level spells.

10.name: Arcane Tradition Feature
10.description: Gain your tradition's 10th-level feature.

11.name: 6th-Level Spells
11.description: You can now prepare and cast 6th-level spells.

12.name: Ability Score Improvement
12.description: Increase one ability score by 2, or two ability scores by 1 each. Alternatively, take a feat.

13.name: 7th-Level Spells
13.description: You can now prepare and cast 7th-level spells.

14.name: Arcane Tradition Feature
14.description: Gain your tradition's 14th-level feature.

15.name: 8th-Level Spells
15.description: You can now prepare and cast 8th-level spells.

16.name: Ability Score Improvement
16.description: Increase one ability score by 2, or two ability scores by 1 each. Alternatively, take a feat.

17.name: 9th-Level Spells
17.description: You can now prepare and cast 9th-level spells.

18.name: Spell Mastery
18.description: Choose a 1st-level and a 2nd-level spell. Cast them at their lowest level without expending spell slots. Can change on a long rest.

19.name: Ability Score Improvement
19.description: Increase one ability score by 2, or two ability scores by 1 each. Alternatively, take a feat.

20.name: Signature Spells
20.description: Choose two 3rd-level wizard spells. Cast them at their lowest level without expending spell slots once each per long rest.

2.name: Evocation Savant
2.description: Gold and time to copy evocation spells into your spellbook is halved.

2.name: Sculpt Spells
2.description: When you cast an evocation spell that affects other creatures, choose a number equal to 1 + spell level. Those creatures automatically succeed on their saves and take no damage.

6.name: Potent Cantrip
6.description: Your damaging cantrips deal additional damage equal to your Intelligence modifier to creatures that fail their saving throws.

10.name: Empowered Evocation
10.description: Add your Intelligence modifier to damage rolls of wizard evocation spells.

14.name: Overchannel
14.description: Cast a wizard evocation spell of 1st-5th level at maximum damage. Take 2d12 necrotic damage per spell level above 1st. Once per short rest.

2.name: Abjuration Savant
2.description: Gold and time to copy abjuration spells into your spellbook is halved.

2.name: Arcane Ward
2.description: Create a magical ward with HP equal to twice your wizard level + Intelligence modifier. Reduces damage you take. Recharges when you cast an abjuration spell of 1st level or higher.

6.name: Projected Ward
6.description: When a creature within 30 feet takes damage, use your reaction to have your ward absorb the damage.

10.name: Improved Abjuration
10.description: Add half your wizard level (rounded up) to spell save DCs of abjuration spells you cast.

14.name: Spell Resistance
14.description: Gain advantage on saving throws against spells. Resistance to damage from spells.

2.name: Necromancy Savant
2.description: Gold and time to copy necromancy spells into your spellbook is halved.

2.name: Grim Harvest
2.description: When you kill a creature with a spell of 1st level or higher, regain HP equal to 2× the spell's level (or 3× if necromancy). No effect on constructs or undead.

6.name: Undead Thralls
6.description: When you cast animate dead, you can target up to 3 additional corpses. The created undead have additional HP and add your proficiency bonus to weapon damage.

10.name: Inured to Undeath
10.description: Resistance to necrotic damage. Your hit point maximum cannot be reduced.

14.name: Command Undead
14.description: You can cast dominate undead once per long rest. Charisma is your spellcasting ability for it.

2.name: Illusion Savant
2.description: Gold and time to copy illusion spells into your spellbook is halved.

2.name: Improved Minor Illusion
2.description: You learn the minor illusion cantrip. When you cast it, you can create both a sound and an image simultaneously.

6.name: Malleable Illusions
6.description: When you cast an illusion spell that requires concentration, you can use your action to change the nature of the illusion.

10.name: Illusory Self
10.description: When attacked, use your reaction to create an illusory duplicate of yourself. The attack hits the duplicate instead. Usable once per short rest.

14.name: Illusory Reality
14.description: Choose one creature you can see to briefly believe an illusion is real. The creature treats the illusion as a real object for 1 minute.

2.name: Enchantment Savant
2.description: Gold and time to copy enchantment spells into your spellbook is halved.

2.name: Hypnotic Gaze
2.description: As an action, choose one creature within 5 feet. It must make a Wisdom save or be charmed by you until end of your next turn. ChaMod/long rest.

6.name: Instinctive Charm
6.description: When a creature makes an attack against you, you can use your reaction to divert the attack to the nearest creature (other than the attacker). WisMod/long rest.

10.name: Split Enchantment
10.description: When you cast an enchantment spell of 1st level or higher that targets one creature, you can target a second creature within range.

14.name: Alter Memories
14.description: When a creature succeeds on a save against your enchantment spell, you can use your reaction to force it to make a second save.

1.name: Spellcasting
1.description: You know 2 cantrips and prepare artificer spells using Intelligence. Your spellcasting focus is your artisan tools.

1.name: Magical Tinkering
1.description: Use your action on a Tiny nonmagical object to give it one of the following properties: produce a sound/message, shed dim light (5 ft), or emit a smell. Lasts until your next turn or 1 hour for smell.

2.name: Infuse Item
2.description: Gain the ability to infuse items with magical enhancements. Number of infusions equals half your artificer level (rounded up).

2.name: Tool Expertise
2.description: Double your proficiency bonus for ability checks using tools.

3.name: Artificer Specialist
3.description: Choose a specialty: Artillerist, Armorer, or Alchemist. Grants specialty-specific features.

3.name: The Right Tool for the Job
3.description: You can craft a set of artisan's tools in 1 hour. They function as any artisan's tools you choose.

4.name: Ability Score Improvement
4.description: Increase one ability score by 2, or two ability scores by 1 each. Alternatively, take a feat.

5.name: 3rd-Level Spells
5.description: You can now prepare 3rd-level spells.

6.name: Tool Expertise
6.description: Double your proficiency bonus for ability checks with your chosen tools.

6.name: Artificer Specialist Feature
6.description: Gain your specialist's 6th-level feature.

7.name: 4th-Level Spells
7.description: You can now prepare 4th-level spells.

8.name: Ability Score Improvement
8.description: Increase one ability score by 2, or two ability scores by 1 each. Alternatively, take a feat.

9.name: 5th-Level Spells
9.description: You can now prepare 5th-level spells.

10.name: Magic Item Adept
10.description: Attune to up to 4 magic items at once.

10.name: Artificer Specialist Feature
10.description: Gain your specialist's 10th-level feature.

11.name: 6th-Level Spells
11.description: You can now prepare 6th-level spells.

12.name: Ability Score Improvement
12.description: Increase one ability score by 2, or two ability scores by 1 each. Alternatively, take a feat.

14.name: Magic Item Savant
14.description: Attune to up to 5 magic items at once.

15.name: 7th-Level Spells
15.description: You can now prepare 7th-level spells.

16.name: Ability Score Improvement
16.description: Increase one ability score by 2, or two ability scores by 1 each. Alternatively, take a feat.

18.name: Magic Item Master
18.description: Attune to up to 6 magic items at once.

19.name: Ability Score Improvement
19.description: Increase one ability score by 2, or two ability scores by 1 each. Alternatively, take a feat.

20.name: Soul of Artifice
20.description: Gain a +1 bonus to all saving throws per magic item you are attuned to.

3.name: Artillerist Spells
3.description: Always have shield, thunderclap, scorching ray, shatter, fireball, wind wall, ice storm, wall of fire, cone of cold prepared.

3.name: Eldritch Cannon
3.description: Learn to summon an Eldritch Cannon (tiny construct). It acts on your turn, and you can command it as a bonus action. Options: Force Ballista, Flame Thrower, Protector.

5.name: Arcane Firearm
5.description: You can transform a magic wand, rod, or staff into an arcane firearm. It can be used as a spellcasting focus. Once per turn, a spell attack from it deals extra 1d8 force damage.

9.name: Explosive Cannon
9.description: When your Eldritch Cannon fires, it can explode. Each creature in the area must make a Dex save or take 2d8 damage.

15.name: Fortified Position
15.description: As an action, deploy your cannon in an area. You and allies gain half cover (+2 AC) while within 10 feet of it.

3.name: Armor Model
3.description: Choose a model: Guardian (heavy armor, replaces Dex with Int for AC, martial weapons) or Infiltrator (medium armor, Int for AC, stealth). You gain proficiency with smith's tools.

3.name: Arcane Armor
3.description: Magically bond with armor you wear. It cannot be removed against your will. Integrates weapons and tools.

5.name: Armor Modifications
5.description: Add your Intelligence modifier to damage rolls with Thunder Gauntlets and Lightning Launcher.

9.name: Armor Model Feature
9.description: Guardian: electrified armor (Thunder Gauntlets shock attackers). Infiltrator: infiltrator's expertise (advantage on Stealth).

15.name: Perfected Armor
15.description: Guardian: anyone who hits you with melee takes force damage. Infiltrator: you can cast invisibility on yourself without expending spell slots (IntMod/long rest).

3.name: Alchemist Spells
3.description: Always have healing word, ray of sickness, purification, lesser restoration, blinding smite, haste, mass healing word, greater restoration, heal prepared.

3.name: Experimental Elixir
3.description: During a long rest, create a number of experimental elixirs equal to your Intelligence modifier (min 1). Random or chosen effects: healing, swiftness, resilience, boldness.

5.name: Alchemical Savant
5.description: When you use alchemist's supplies as your spellcasting focus, add your Intelligence modifier to healing dealt or damage dealt (if the spell has a potion/brew theme).

9.name: Restorative Reagents
9.description: When you administer a potion or elixir to a creature, they gain additional benefits based on the type.

15.name: Master Alchemist
15.description: You can produce enough alchemical materials for free during a long rest. You can also create more powerful versions of your elixirs.

1.name: Blood Maledict
1.description: Gain hemocraft dice that can be used to amplify Blood Curse effects. The die increases with level (d4 at 1st, d6 at 5th, d8 at 9th, d10 at 13th, d12 at 17th).

1.name: Blood Curses
1.description: Learn a Blood Curse of your choice. Blood Curses are special abilities that cost hemocraft dice and sometimes HP to use.

1.name: Darkvision
1.description: Gain darkvision with a range of 60 feet.

2.name: Fighting Style
2.description: Choose a fighting style.

2.name: Crimson Rite
2.description: As a bonus action, imbue your weapon with hemocraft. Attacks deal extra rite damage based on level (1d4 at 2nd). Lose HP equal to your level when you activate.

3.name: Hunter's Bane
3.description: Gain advantage on Survival checks to track fey, fiends, and undead. Also gain advantage on Intelligence checks to recall information about them.

3.name: Blood Curse
3.description: Learn an additional Blood Curse.

4.name: Ability Score Improvement
4.description: Increase one ability score by 2, or two ability scores by 1 each. Alternatively, take a feat.

5.name: Extra Attack
5.description: You can attack twice when you take the Attack action.

5.name: Blood Maledict (d6)
5.description: Your hemocraft die increases to a d6.

6.name: Blood Curse
6.description: Learn an additional Blood Curse.

7.name: Brand of Castigation
7.description: When you hit a marked creature with an attack, it must make a Wisdom save or take additional rite damage.

8.name: Ability Score Improvement
8.description: Increase one ability score by 2, or two ability scores by 1 each. Alternatively, take a feat.

9.name: Blood Maledict (d8)
9.description: Your hemocraft die increases to a d8.

9.name: Hardened
9.description: Gain proficiency in either Strength or Constitution saving throws.

10.name: Blood Curse
10.description: Learn an additional Blood Curse.

11.name: Dark augmentation
11.description: Your Crimson Rite damage increases to 2d6.

12.name: Ability Score Improvement
12.description: Increase one ability score by 2, or two ability scores by 1 each. Alternatively, take a feat.

13.name: Blood Maledict (d10)
13.description: Your hemocraft die increases to a d10.

13.name: Sanguine Recall
13.description: When you use Second Wind or a similar feature, regain additional HP equal to your hemocraft die + proficiency bonus.

14.name: Blood Curse
14.description: Learn an additional Blood Curse.

15.name: Brand of Tethering
15.description: When you hit a creature marked with your brand, you can tether them to the ground (speed reduced to 0).

16.name: Ability Score Improvement
16.description: Increase one ability score by 2, or two ability scores by 1 each. Alternatively, take a feat.

17.name: Blood Maledict (d12)
17.description: Your hemocraft die increases to a d12.

18.name: Brand of the Crimson Immortal
18.description: Gain resistance to necrotic damage. When reduced to 0 HP, if you have Crimson Rite active, drop to 1 HP instead.

19.name: Ability Score Improvement
19.description: Increase one ability score by 2, or two ability scores by 1 each. Alternatively, take a feat.

20.name: Sanguine Mastery
20.description: Gain immunity to necrotic damage. Your Crimson Rite damage increases to 3d8. Brand effects become permanent.

3.name: Formulas
3.description: Learn mutagenic formulas that grant temporary enhancements at the cost of HP and hemocraft dice.

3.name: Predator
3.description: Gain darkvision (120 ft) and tremorsense (30 ft). Gain a swimming and climbing speed equal to your walking speed.

7.name: Advanced Mutagens
7.description: Gain access to higher-level mutagen options.

11.name: Strange Metabolism
11.description: Gain resistance to poison damage and advantage on Constitution saves.

15.name: Mutation
15.description: Choose a permanent mutation: additional attack, enhanced senses, or natural weapons.

3.name: Rite of the Dawn
3.description: When you use Crimson Rite, you can choose to deal radiant damage instead of the normal type. Undead take additional damage equal to your hemocraft die.

7.name: Brand of the Fallen
7.description: When a creature marked with your brand dies within 30 feet, you gain temporary HP equal to your level.

11.name: Supernatural Resistance
11.description: Gain resistance to necrotic and radiant damage.

15.name: Rite Revival
15.description: Spend all your hemocraft dice to restore a dead creature to life. The creature returns with 1 HP.

3.name: Eldritch Versatility
3.description: Choose eldritch invocations and learn them based on your blood hunter level. You can select from the warlock invocation list.

3.name: Mystic Arcanum
3.description: At 7th level, learn a 1st-level warlock spell. At 11th, learn a 2nd-level. At 15th, learn a 3rd-level.

7.name: Eldritch Versatility Enhancement
7.description: Gain additional invocations and learn a warlock spell.

11.name: Eldritch Versatility Enhancement
11.description: Gain additional invocations and learn a higher-level warlock spell.

15.name: Eldritch Versatility Enhancement
15.description: Gain additional invocations and learn a higher-level warlock spell.
